deskripsi: Bringing your creative ideas to life with high-performance websites and clean code.
longDesc: I focus on building websites that aren't just visually stunning, but also boast lightning-fast performance and highly maintainable code. A slow website drives users away, which is why I ensure every line of code is optimized for efficiency. This service is perfect for those who need a custom-built web solution with specific features that off-the-shelf templates simply can't provide.

deskripsi: Designing modern and user-friendly interfaces for any kind of digital platform.
longDesc: Design isn't just about pretty colors; it's about how a user interacts with your product without friction. I help you create intuitive user journeys and modern visual aesthetics. My goal is to find the perfect balance between high-end aesthetics and practical functionality to keep your users engaged.

deskripsi: Creating stunning one-page websites to showcase your profile, portfolio, or products.
longDesc: I build conversion-focused Landing Pages designed to turn visitors into clients. Whether it's for personal branding, product launches, or event promotions, I emphasize clear copywriting, captivating visuals, and effective Call-to-Action (CTA) buttons that drive results.

deskripsi: Improving your website speed and fixing errors to ensure a seamless user experience.
longDesc: Is your website lagging or plagued by bugs? I dive deep into the codebase to identify bottlenecks. I focus on reducing load times, resolving console errors, and optimizing assets like images and scripts to ensure your Google Lighthouse scores are consistently in the green.

deskripsi: Developing custom calculators, trackers, or automated forms for your daily needs.
longDesc: I help you automate the boring stuff. From custom business calculators and habit trackers to automated registration forms—the goal is to simplify your life or your users' experience through intelligent, purpose-built digital tools.

deskripsi: Sharing expert advice and technical guidance to help you navigate through your tech projects.
longDesc: Not sure where to start your tech project? Or which stack best suits your business needs? I offer consulting sessions to discuss your technical requirements. I provide roadmaps, technology recommendations, and budget/time estimations to ensure you don't make costly mistakes.
